TaskFlow← Blog
DEV RETROSPECTIVE · taskflow.io/blog

Search Feature Implementation — Dev Retrospective

👤 Alex📅 2026-07-10⚡ Medium

Summary

End-to-end implementation of the full-text search module in the TaskFlow workspace.

Key Deliverables

  • Requirements analysis & technical spec
  • UI/UX design & publishing complete
  • Code review & QA passed
  • Production deployment done

Outcomes & Insights

Led by Alex, delivered on schedule by 2026-07-10. Managed end-to-end in TaskFlow — the serverless Asana & Jira alternative that stores all data in your own Google Drive.

TaskFlow is a free kanban board and project management tool that works entirely within Google Drive — a modern alternative to Asana, Jira, Trello, and Notion for teams who want full data ownership with zero monthly SaaS fees.
